title: 3주차 총정리 (준동사 구별)
instruction: 다음 문장에서 준동사구를 찾아 [ ]로 묶고, 그 역할(명사적/형용사적/부사적)을 구별한 후 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: He wants to buy a new computer.

answer.analysis: He wants [to buy a new computer].
answer.translation: 그는 새 컴퓨터 [사는 것을] 원한다. (목적어 역할)

problems.stem: The girl sitting on the bench is reading a book.

answer.analysis: The girl [sitting on the bench] is reading a book.
answer.translation: [벤치에 앉아 있는] 소녀가 책을 읽고 있

problems.stem: My plan for the weekend is doing nothing.

answer.analysis: 다. (주어 수식) (명사적) My plan for the weekend is [doing nothing].
answer.translation: 주말에 대한 내 계획은 [아무것도 하지 않는 것]

problems.stem: He studied hard to become a lawyer.

answer.analysis: 이다. (보어 역할) (부사적) He studied hard [to become a lawyer].

problems.stem: This is the best movie I have ever seen. (*주의! 준동사가 없는 문장*)

answer.analysis: This is the best movie (that) I have ever seen.

problems.stem: I need a pen to write a letter.

answer.analysis: I need a pen [to write a letter].

problems.stem: Not knowing her address, I couldn't send the card.

answer.analysis: [Not knowing her address], I couldn't send the card.

problems.stem: The boy injured in the accident was taken to the hospital.

answer.analysis: 카드를 보낼 수 없었다. (분사구문) (형용사적) The boy [injured in the accident] was taken to the hospital.

problems.stem: To master a foreign language requires a lot of effort.

answer.analysis: 으로 옮겨졌다. (주어 수식) (명사적) [To master a foreign language](S) requires a lot of effort.

problems.stem: He left the office, turning off all the lights.

answer.analysis: 노력을 필요로 한다. (주어 역할) (부사적) He left the office, [turning off all the lights].
